question: When can I access the LMS module?
answer: You can access the LMS module after your onboarding has been completed and your profile has been verified.

question: How do I start my training?
answer: Log in to the platform, open the Training section, and click 'Start Training' to begin your learning journey.

question: Why do I need to accept the participation agreement?
answer: Accepting the participation agreement is mandatory before you can begin your assigned training.

question: Will I see the participation agreement every time I log in?
answer: No. The participation agreement is displayed only on your first login and will not appear again after you accept it.

question: What training options can I choose from?
answer: Depending on your eligibility, you can choose either General Training or Programme Training.

question: How do I select a course?
answer: After selecting your training type, browse the available courses and open the one assigned or available to you.

question: What information can I view before starting a course?
answer: You can view the course description, requirements, expected outcomes, and curriculum before starting.

question: Can I check my learning progress?
answer: Yes. You can view your course progress, including completed modules, content count, and the last updated date.

question: What happens when I click 'Start Learning'?
answer: Your learning begins with a pre-test, followed by the course modules and a post-test at the end.

question: Is the pre-test mandatory?
answer: Yes. The pre-test is part of the learning process and appears before you start the course content.

question: What types of learning materials are included in a course?
answer: Courses may include videos, presentations (PPTs), case studies, and multiple-choice questions (MCQs).

question: Can I choose between reading and watching the learning content?
answer: Yes. Depending on the module, you can either read the learning material or watch the available videos.

question: Can I take breaks and continue my course later?
answer: Yes. Your progress is tracked, allowing you to continue your learning from where you left off.

question: Can I set reminders for my training?
answer: Yes. You can set reminders to help you stay on track with your course schedule.

question: Can I interact with other entrepreneurs during training?
answer: Yes. You can participate in discussion forums related to your course.

question: When can I rate a learning module?
answer: The rating option becomes available after you complete a module.

question: What happens after I complete all course modules?
answer: You will be required to complete the post-test before marking the course as completed.

question: Is the post-test mandatory?
answer: Yes. The post-test is mandatory and cannot be skipped.

question: How do I officially complete my course?
answer: After passing through the required learning steps, click 'Mark as Completed' to complete your course.

question: What happens if I forget to mark my course as completed?
answer: Your course may not be recorded as completed until you click 'Mark as Completed'.

question: Is there a deadline for completing my training?
answer: Yes. Each course has a completion timeline defined by the programme administrators.

question: What happens if I miss the training deadline?
answer: If you do not complete the LMS within the required timeline, you may be dropped from the programme.

question: Can I receive reminders about my course?
answer: Yes. Reminder notifications may be sent to help you complete your training on time.

question: Can I see how much of my course I have completed?
answer: Yes. Your progress dashboard shows completed modules and overall learning progress.

question: Can I take more than one course?
answer: Yes. Depending on your assigned programme, you may have access to multiple courses.

question: Will my assigned programme affect the courses I see?
answer: Yes. Courses are linked to programmes, so your available courses depend on your assigned programme.

question: Can I access learning content in different languages?
answer: Yes. The platform supports multilingual learning content where available.

question: Can I revisit completed course content?
answer: If access is still available, you can reopen your completed course materials for reference.

question: Do I need to complete every module?
answer: Yes. Complete all required modules and assessments before marking the course as completed.

question: What should I do if I cannot access my course?
answer: Ensure your onboarding and verification are complete and that you are enrolled in the appropriate programme.

question: Can I monitor the number of modules in my course?
answer: Yes. The course progress section displays the total number of modules and learning content.

question: Will I know when the course content was last updated?
answer: Yes. Each course displays the last updated date for your reference.

question: Can I ask questions during my training?
answer: Yes. Use the discussion forum to ask questions and interact with other entrepreneurs.

question: Can I skip directly to the final assessment?
answer: No. You should complete the required learning modules before taking the post-test.

question: What is the purpose of the post-test?
answer: The post-test helps evaluate your understanding after completing the learning modules.

question: Will the LMS save my learning progress automatically?
answer: Your course progress is tracked so you can monitor your learning journey.

question: Can I complete my training using only videos?
answer: Courses may contain different learning formats such as videos, PPTs, case studies, and quizzes, so you should complete all required content.

question: What happens after I finish all my assigned training?
answer: Once you complete all required courses and assessments, your LMS training is recorded as completed.

question: Can the chatbot help me with LMS-related questions?
answer: Yes. The chatbot can answer questions about LMS features, learning workflows, assessments, reminders, and course completion.

question: How can I successfully complete my LMS training?
answer: Accept the participation agreement, complete all learning modules, finish the pre-test and post-test, and mark the course as completed before the deadline.
